description: Goal Alignment: Verify implementation behavior aligns with apparent intent.

fixtures.notes: Commit says 'fix null check' but diff adds unrelated Redis caching logic instead of addressing null safety.
Method is renamed to ValidateAndSave but the validation logic is absent — it only saves without validating.
Method named 'add retry logic' and the diff clearly implements exponential backoff retry as advertised.
Docstring says 'normalize whitespace' and the implementation correctly trims and lowercases the string.
Some validation is added but the documented requirement lists four checks and only two are implemented.
